title: Ali & Cavett: The Tale of the Tapes
original_title: Ali & Cavett: The Tale of the Tapes
overview: The life and times of Muhammed Ali shown through the lens of his numerous appearances on The Dick Cavett Show. The film features new interviews with Dick Cavett, Rev. Al Sharpton, and Larry Merchant, as well as archival material from the Cavett Show.
